project_context.domain: Solar Energy Dashboard / Small Business Tool
project_context.archetype: 1 (Organic & Earthy) - Warm sand, bone-white, earth-tones to convey trust and energy.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight font-heading font-semibold text-stone-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl tracking-tight font-heading font-medium text-stone-800
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-body font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-stone-500

colors.usage: Use primary color sparingly for primary actions (Generate button, active state). Use subtle earth tones for backgrounds. Avoid pure white for app background; use off-white (#F5F5F0).

layout_and_spacing.containers: p-6 md:p-8 rounded-2xl bg-surface border border-border shadow-sm
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room grid: tight gaps (gap-6) for forms. Use grid-cols-1 on mobile, md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 for dense data entry fields.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align forms and dense content. Ensure visual alignment of labels and inputs.

components.forms: Shadcn UI heavily customized. Inputs and selects should have flat backgrounds (bg-stone-50), subtle borders, and focus rings using primary color. No floating labels.
components.buttons: Solid rounded-lg shapes. Primary: bg-[#D97706] text-white hover:bg-[#B45309]. Secondary: outline or ghost.
components.editable_list: Cardless, linear list style. Items should have a subtle border-b border-border/50. Hovering highlights the row for editing.
components.pdf_preview: Design a print-ready A4-proportioned view. Must look like a formal document (sans-serif clean typography, high contrast, vendor details prominent).

motion.micro_interactions: Subtle hover states on list items and buttons. Use Framer Motion for a smooth entry animation of the form on load.

images.description: Solar panels on a suburban home. Use as a top banner overlay or print header background with a heavy white fade so text remains legible.

icons.usage: Use icons for section headers (e.g., User, MapPin, Calendar, Zap for kW, Calculator for amount).

development_instructions.stack: React.js (JavaScript, NOT TypeScript), Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI.
development_instructions.testing: All interactive elements (inputs, selects, buttons, editable rows) MUST include `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid='customer-name-input'`).
logic_requirements: GST Calculation: User enters Total Amount. Basic Price = Total Amount / 1.089. GST Amount = Total Amount - Basic Price. Display all three.
Auto-fill: When user selects kW from range (3 KW to 500 KW), automatically update the Inverter list item to '[Selected] kW Grid-Tied Inverter...'.
Print formatting: Implement react-to-print or native window.print() with specific `@media print` CSS to hide UI controls and just print the generated quotation document.
Quotation History: Save generated quotes to localStorage and display in a 'History' tab/modal.
development_instructions.vendor_details: NewFriends SolarEnergy, Office: Ramdittewala Kanchiyan Near 4 Season Hotel, Mansa (Punjab-151505). Head Office: V.P.O. Makha, Mansa, Punjab. Contact: 98724-07002. Hardcode these into the template.
default_items: I. Solar PV Modules: Monoperc Bifacial DCR Panels (590Wp / 156 Cell) – 9 Nos.
II. Solar Inverter: [ ] kW Grid-Tied Inverter (Tata Power Solar Approved)
IV. Module Mounting Structure: Elevated Structure / Hot-Dip Galvanized GI
V. DC Electrical Cabling: Polycab / Birla DC Solar Wire
VI. AC Electrical Cabling: Havells AC Wire
VII. Earthing & Grounding: Heavy-duty Ground Earthing (250mm)
VIII. Lightning Protection: Elite Lightning Arrester (LA)
IX. Down-Conductor: Havells 16mm Copper Wire (LA to Earthing Strip Connection)
XI. Hardware & Fasteners: Stainless Steel (SS) Nuts & Bolts
